Place your textures here:

BLOCK TEXTURES (16x16 PNG):
  textures/block/dark_nest.png
    — Dark, veiny/spiderweb-like texture. Suggested: near-black with dark red veins.
    — Should glow with a dark red/amber rim to look eerie.

ITEM TEXTURES (16x16 PNG):
  textures/item/dark_nest_egg.png
    — A dark egg shape with glowing red cracks.

MOB EFFECT ICON (18x18 PNG):
  textures/mob_effect/dark_sight.png
    — Red eye icon (like Hunt Showdown's Dark Sight icon).

You can find free Minecraft texture templates on:
  https://minecraft.wiki/w/Tutorials/Creating_a_resource_pack
